value.string: <input name="userid" id="userid" class="textInput" type="text" placeholder="Identificador de Usuario" autocomplete="off" onkeypress="return submitCreds(event)" maxlength="200">
<input name="password" id="password" class="textInput" type="password" placeholder="Contraseña" autocomplete="off" onkeypress="return submitCreds(event)" maxlength="200">
<button class="btnActiveChooser signinWidth" type="button" id="btnActive" onclick="onClickSubmit('local');">Iniciar sesión </button>
